evals.prompt: good morning — what's on my plate today? i've got the gmail and calendar connectors hooked up and i'd like the news section to track AI and SaaS specifically
evals.expected_output: An interactive HTML dashboard saved to the working folder with sections: today's schedule timeline, inbox snapshot (top 5 unread + flagged), Slack pulse if connector available, 3-5 news headlines on AI/SaaS with 'why it matters' notes, loose ends from yesterday, and a 'Today's one thing' synthesis. Plus a short Slack-ready summary printed in chat (under 600 chars). On first run, asks whether to save preferences to briefing-config.md for future runs.

evals.prompt: can you set me up to get this briefing every weekday at 7am? want it to ping me in slack too
evals.expected_output: Sets up a recurring scheduled task that runs Mon-Fri at 7am, generates the briefing HTML in a briefings/ subfolder dated by run, and posts the short summary to the user's Slack via connector. Confirms the schedule and tells the user where briefings will be saved.

Recognizes this as a morning briefing trigger despite the casual phrasing. Generates the full dashboard + Slack summary using existing briefing-config.md if it exists, or runs first-time setup if not.
